title: Abridged
description: Bridges big and small across rivers and valleys.
body:
## Abridged 
This mod adds naturally generating bridges over rivers. These bridges can cross over anywhere from small creeks to massive canyons.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tb5O1ssC/images/51acc70652227f8b4ecbda83872098f9104d4449.png)

There's eleven variants of these for you find throughout your world, and you'll have to travel far and wide to see them all. If there's too many bridges for your liking, you can reduce their rarity in the mod's config file.

## Compatibility
Abridged is compatible with most structure and biome mods. Bridge placement may get funky with terrain generation mods like Tectonic and Lithosphere.
